subcodes.first_line: O pure soul! The effects of thy jewel-scattering pen were observed. Thou hadst offered thine apologies, bewailing the feebleness of thy tongue [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جان پاک اثر کلک گهربار ملاحظه گردید اعتذار فرموده بودید که زبان کلیل و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
